productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Stripes Blue Black Umbrella
description: From a fashion accessory to an all-season necessity, the umbrella has come a long way. This compact umbrella from united colors of benetton has been crafted with absolute waterproof material and unique prints that give you a colourful edge in all seasons! Three-fold umbrella with eight ribs and stretchers made of stainless steel Shade and cover made of 100% polyamide for waterproofing and easy storage Cap measures 100 cm in diameter when opened up Umbrella measures 24 cm in length when packed Green and black striped print shade and cover with green and black striped print Sturdy stainless steel tube with a runner, top and bottom spring, and an open cap Black rounded plastic tip cup and press button on the umbrella that has the Big Ben logo Haul loop for hanging ease Care Wipe dust and dirt with a damp, clean cloth Hang dry in shade
